zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander de Godolphin於1295年出生在英國可瓦爾格道爾分 克羅斯時，他的父親Edward de Godolphin II25歲，母親Christian de Prideaux21歲。他於大約1319年與Margaret "Marrion" Tremrow在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1349年12月在他的家鄉享年54歲，埋葬在英國可瓦爾格道爾分 克羅斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander de Godolphin于1295年出生在英国可瓦爾格道爾分 克羅斯时，他的父亲Edward de Godolphin II25岁，母亲Christian de Prideaux21岁。他于大约1319年与Margaret "Marrion" Tremrow在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1349年12月在他的家乡享年54岁，埋葬在英国可瓦爾格道爾分 克羅斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Godolphin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Cornish, English: locative name from Godolphin (Cornwall), recorded as Wulgholgan in 1194.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander de Godolphin was born in 1295, in Godolphin Cross, Cornwall, England, his father, Edward de Godolphin II, was 25 and his mother, Christian de Prideaux, was 21. He married Margaret "Marrion" Tremrow about 1319, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in December 1349, in his hometown, at the age of 54, and was buried in Godolphin Cross, Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander de Godolphin est né en 1295, à Godolphin Cross, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Edward de Godolphin II, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Christian de Prideaux, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaret "Marrion" Tremrow environ 1319, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en décembre 1349, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Godolphin Cross, Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.Godolphin, Helston, Cornwall, England, U: Godolphin Cross, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander de Godolphin 1295 in Godolphin Cross, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward de Godolphin II 25 und seine Mutter Christian de Prideaux 21. Er hat um 1319 in England Margaret "Marrion" Tremrow geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im Dezember 1349 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Godolphin Cross, Cornwall, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander de Godolphin è nato il nel 1295 nel Godolphin Cross, Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Edward de Godolphin II, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Christian de Prideaux, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Margaret "Marrion" Tremrow circa 1319, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel dicembre 1349, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Godolphin Cross, Cornwall, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander de Godolphinが1295年にイギリスコルンワルゴドルフィン クロスで生まれた時，父Edward de Godolphin IIは25歳，母Christian de Prideauxは21歳であった。約1319年にイギリスでMargaret "Marrion" Tremrowと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1349年12月に故郷で54歳で死去し，イギリスコルンワルゴドルフィン クロスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander de Godolphin(이)가 1295년 영국 코른월 고돌필 크로스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward de Godolphin II(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Christian de Prideaux(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1319년 영국에서 Margaret "Marrion" Tremrow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1349년 12월 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 코른월 고돌필 크로스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander de Godolphin nasceu em 1295, em Godolphin Cross, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward de Godolphin II, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Christian de Prideaux, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret "Marrion" Tremrow aproximadamente 1319, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 1349, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Godolphin Cross, Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ro.Godolphin, Helston, Cornwall, England, U: Godolphin Cross, Cornwall, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander de Godolphin родился в 1295 г. в местности годолфин кросс, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Edward de Godolphin II было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian de Prideaux, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret "Marrion" Tremrow около 1319 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер декабрь 1349 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности годолфин кросс, корнвалл, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander de Godolphin nació en 1295, en Godolphin Cross, Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Edward de Godolphin II, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Christian de Prideaux, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Margaret "Marrion" Tremrow aproximadamente 1319, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en diciembre de 1349, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Godolphin Cross, Cornwall, Inglaterra.
